race.description: Tabtouch Try Bet Loop Today Preux Chevalier (G2)
race.comment: LAZI DAIS (1) has been racking up the wins, making it five in a row when leading from a wider barrier to score by 4.5m here last week. That took his record at this venue to four from six and he has the gate speed to take advantage of the ace draw. Last season's WA Derby winner RUNKLE CRUNCH NZ (4) has returned in good form, recording two wins and a second in three starts so far this time in. Drew wider and raced three wide without cover but was too tough in scoring by 2.6m here last week. Big threat. MAD MONDAY (8) has led to win his two starts here since a spell, defeating Runkle Crunch last time. A wider draw poses a challenge but winning form is hard to knock. LAST HARD COPY (5) has placed from 20m handicaps in both outings this time in and is two from two when third-up so include.
